name: agent_brief
description: Intelligence brief for any Virtuals/ACP agent. Input: agent name, ID, or keyword. Output fields: agentId, name, description, category, walletAddress, token {address, symbol}, metrics {isOnline, successfulJobs, successRate, uniqueBuyers, lastSeenMinutesAgo}, offerings[] {name, description, price, priceType}, resources[]. Use cases: due diligence before hiring, compare agents in 10 seconds, agent discovery, agent review, ecosystem research. Triggers: agent brief, agent info, who is agent, agent lookup, agent profile, find agent.

agentName.description: Agent name, numeric ID, or keyword to search for
